scripts.sync-schema: cp ../moddef/gen/ts/moddef/v1/*.ts packages/core/src/schema/ && sed -i -E 's|from "(\./[a-z_]+_pb)"|from "\1.js"|g' packages/core/src/schema/*_pb.ts && git diff --exit-code -- packages/core/src/schema || echo 'schema updated'
scripts.smoke:browser: npm run build && node packages/codegen/dist/cli.js gen -o test-output/smoke ../devices/energy-meter/eastron-sdm630/eastron-sdm630.moddef.yaml && node scripts/browser-smoke.mjs
